meaning: a working group; a task force
sentence: 镇上派了一支工作队来帮助受灾的村民。
pinyin: Zhèn shàng pài le yī zhī gōngzuòduì lái bāngzhù shòuzāi de cūnmín.
english: The town sent a task force to help the villagers affected by the disaster.

meaning: the rules and discipline that apply within a family; stick used for pu
sentence: 爷爷说他小时候犯错是要受家法处置的。
pinyin: Yéye shuō tā xiǎoshíhòu fàncuò shì yào shòu jiāfǎ chǔzhì de.
english: Grandpa said that when he was young, making mistakes meant being punished under family rules.

sentence: 他把喜糖分送给了办公室里的每个同事。
pinyin: Tā bǎ xǐtáng fēn sòng gěi le bàngōngshì lǐ de měi gè tóngshì.
english: He handed out wedding candy to every colleague in the office.

sentence: 这几年城里的房价涨了不少。
pinyin: Zhè jǐ nián chéng lǐ de fángjià zhǎng le bùshǎo.
english: House prices in the city have risen quite a bit in the past few years.

sentence: 我下班后直接去超市买菜。
pinyin: Wǒ xià bān hòu zhíjiē qù chāoshì mǎi cài.
english: I go straight to the supermarket to buy groceries after getting off work.
